title: Kenyan Skewers with Crunchy Slaw
description: A flavorful and colorful dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring marinated meats and vegetables served with a cool and crunchy slaw.

ingredients.name: kenyan vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes

instructions: Cut the vegetables into bite-sized pieces and thread them onto the skewers.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, salt, and pepper to make the slaw dressing.
In a separate bowl, combine the shredded cabbage and the slaw dressing.
Grill the skewers over medium heat for 5-7 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Serve the grilled skewers with the cool and crunchy slaw on top.
